patterns.name: Pipeline
patterns.codex_usage: Parent-only or sequential bounded subagent phases.

patterns.name: Fan-out/Fan-in
patterns.codex_usage: Parallel read-heavy analysis followed by parent integration.

patterns.name: Expert Pool
patterns.codex_usage: Selective specialist custom agents invoked only when needed.

patterns.name: Producer-Reviewer
patterns.codex_usage: Reviewer returns issues; parent owns final updates.

patterns.name: Supervisor
patterns.codex_usage: Parent orchestrator allocates and tracks work.
